title: sqlite3_blob_reopen() misbehavior on ALTER-ed table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('Item1', 10.5), ('Item2', NULL), ('Item3', 20.0);
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD COLUMN description TEXT;
UPDATE t2 SET description = 'This is item 1' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: sqlite3_blob_reopen() fails to detect NULL in new column
